title: lepisorus pseudonudus
intro: Lepisorus pseudonudus is a species of fern, specifically a type of creeping fern, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Lepisorus pseudonudus include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Lepisorus pseudonudus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
